subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the holy breaths! Thou hast indeed raised verses of thanksgiving unto the Ancient God, inasmuch as He hath guided thee unto the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس قد تلوت ایات شکرک لله القدیم بما هداک الی صراط
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @music and singing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
